message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "title": "ALLBUS – German General Social Survey (cumulated)",
      "description": "National survey series on social attitudes and conditions in Germany; covers employment, education, family life and marriage, and a wide range of social indicators across waves.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Employment",
        "Higher and further education",
        "Social conditions and indicators",
        "Family life and marriage"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP – Family and Changing Gender Roles (cumulative)",
      "description": "Cross-national survey modules focusing on family structures, partnerships, gender roles, marriage and work–family balance; includes German samples archived by GESIS.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Family life and marriage",
        "Employment",
        "Social conditions and indicators"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "ISSP – Work Orientations (cumulative)",
      "description": "Cross-national modules on work, employment, job quality, training opportunities, and labor market attitudes; includes German samples archived by GESIS.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Employment",
        "Vocational education and training",
        "Social conditions and indicators"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "European Values Study (EVS) – Integrated dataset",
      "description": "Cross-national survey on values and social change; includes German data on family, education, work, and social indicators.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Social conditions and indicators",
        "Family life and marriage",
        "Employment",
        "Higher and further education"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "GESIS Panel",
      "description": "Probability-based longitudinal panel of adults in Germany; includes modules on education, vocational training, labor market participation, and family dynamics.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Employment",
        "Vocational education and training",
        "Higher and further education",
        "Social conditions and indicators",
        "Family life and marriage"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "Generations and Gender Survey (GGS) – Germany",
      "description": "German wave(s) of the GGS focusing on family formation, partnerships, fertility, work–family arrangements, and related social indicators.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Family life and marriage",
        "Social conditions and indicators",
        "Employment"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "pairfam – German Family Panel",
      "description": "Longitudinal panel on partnerships and family life in Germany; examines union formation, marriage, childbearing, and their links to education and employment.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Family life and marriage",
        "Social conditions and indicators",
        "Employment",
        "Higher and further education"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "CILS4EU-DE – Children of Immigrants Longitudinal Survey in Four European Countries (Germany)",
      "description": "German component of a longitudinal study on educational trajectories, transition to work, family background, and social integration among youth.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Higher and further education",
        "Vocational education and training",
        "Employment",
        "Family life and marriage",
        "Social conditions and indicators"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "BIBB/BAuA Employment Survey (Erwerbstätigenbefragung)",
      "description": "Survey of employed persons in Germany focusing on working conditions, qualifications, vocational training, and employment trajectories.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Employment",
        "Vocational education and training",
        "Social conditions and indicators"
      ]
    },
    {
      "title": "DJI Familiensurvey (German Family Survey)",
      "description": "Survey series by the German Youth Institute on family structures, marriage, parenting, and social living conditions in Germany.",
      "host": "GESIS",
      "topics": [
        "Family life and marriage",
        "Social conditions and indicators",
        "Employment"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
